title: turnera melochia
intro: Turnera melochia, also known as the West Indian joy plant or monkey face, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turnera melochia include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Turnera melochia are often made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are used to support overall well-being and address various health issues.
